'''sadongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabream|seabream]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabream|seabream]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sadongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædengeth|sædengeth]] || [[word:sædengej|sædengej]] || [[word:sædengesh|sædengesh]] || [[word:sædenge|sædenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadodongoth|sadodongoth]] || [[word:sadodongoj|sadodongoj]] || [[word:sadodongosh|sadodongosh]] || [[word:sadodongo|sadodongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadongoth|sadongoth]] || [[word:sadongoj|sadongoj]] || [[word:sadongosh|sadongosh]] || [[word:sadongo|sadongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadofngoth|sadofngoth]] || [[word:sadofngoj|sadofngoj]] || [[word:sadofngosh|sadofngosh]] || [[word:sadofngof|sadofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadongotho|sadongotho]] || [[word:sadongojo|sadongojo]] || [[word:sadongosho|sadongosho]] || [[word:sadongoko|sadongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadongoth|sadongoth]] || [[word:sadongoj|sadongoj]] || [[word:sadongosh|sadongosh]] || [[word:sadongo|sadongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadongothol|sadongothol]] || [[word:sadongojol|sadongojol]] || [[word:sadongoshol|sadongoshol]] || [[word:sadongokol|sadongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadongothotho|sadongothotho]] || [[word:sadongojojo|sadongojojo]] || [[word:sadongoshosho|sadongoshosho]] || [[word:sadongoko|sadongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadongothon|sadongothon]] || [[word:sadongojon|sadongojon]] || [[word:sadongoshon|sadongoshon]] || [[word:sadongokon|sadongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadongothoro|sadongothoro]] || [[word:sadongojoro|sadongojoro]] || [[word:sadongoshoro|sadongoshoro]] || [[word:sadongokoro|sadongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
